## [06:05 - 06:56]

people you're not able to make a match. So what you need to do, it's that simple. What you need to do is you need to add an apostrophe. That's just it. Just an apostrophe before you map the custom field. That's it. Just one apostrophe, no spaces, no nothing, just one apostrophe before the first step. Click continue. You're good to go. You're good to go. So keep in mind to not forget the apostrophe before you map the custom field with the user ID in order to prevent the Manichat user IDs to be fucked up in your Google Sheets so you're not able to use them.
